headline: Planner entry context now keeps the city or sample close with a usable mini loop instead of a passive note.
notes: Planner entry context cards now include direct links back to the relevant city guide, matching sample, and recent result when available.
City-guide starts reopen the guide or sample more easily while staying in the same city context.
Sample-based starts can jump back to the sample or city guide without losing the planner handoff.
Added click telemetry for planner entry-context actions so the mini loop is easier to observe during beta.
